flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Southeast New Mexico College fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (62.0% → 48.9%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Southeast New Mexico College rose 157% between 2006 and 2009 (2.2% → 5.7%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Southeast New Mexico College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.9% → 0.0%).
